scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'if [ -n "$EAS_BUILD" ] || [ "$CI" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.eas-build-pre-install:
npm install -g pnpm@10.26.1 && printf 'packages:
  - artifacts/*
  - lib/*
  - lib/integrations/*
  - scripts
' > pnpm-workspace.yaml && rm -f pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && echo 'EAS pre-install complete'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
